description_long: This object is a stylized, double-edged sword with a symmetrical design, split into two distinct color schemes: blue on the left and pink on the right. The blade is straight and tapers to a fine point, with alternating colored bands running along its length. The hilt features a prominent crossguard, also split into blue and pink, and a cylindrical handle that matches the color division. At the center of the crossguard, a heart-shaped cutout is visible, adding a decorative and symbolic element. The overall design is modern and playful, with a matte finish and bold, contrasting colors.
description: A stylized, double-edged sword split into blue and pink halves with a heart-shaped cutout in the crossguard. The blade is straight and tapers to a point, with a matching colored handle and guard.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and the color split along its length.
description_view_1: A frontal view revealing the heart-shaped cutout in the crossguard and the clear division between blue and pink halves.
description_view_2: A narrow, edge-on view from the opposite side, highlighting the pink half of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: A rear view similar to the front, showing the heart-shaped cutout and the color split, but with the pink and blue sides reversed.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, smooth, color-matched to blade, no visible grip texture
